properties.name: Worth Ranch
properties.address: 1518 Worth Ranch Road, Palo Pinto, TX 76484
properties.description: Scout ranch roughly 60 miles west of Fort Worth, offering summer camp and year-round camping programs.

properties.name: Camp Alaflo
properties.description: 520-acre council camp near Enterprise featuring lake swimming, canoeing, archery, shotgun, and rifle ranges.

properties.name: Camp Comer Scout Reservation
properties.description: 1,000+ acre scout reservation on Lookout Mountain featuring a 90-acre lake, 5-mile Thunderbird Trail with waterfalls and rock crevices. Open since 1966.

properties.name: Camp Horne
properties.description: 488-acre nationally accredited summer camp with two lakes, shooting sports complex, and climbing/rappelling tower. In operation since 1924.

properties.name: Camp Jack Wright
properties.description: 40-acre primitive camping facility in Roupes Valley surrounded by Tannehill Historical State Park. Dedicated May 4, 1997.

properties.name: Camp Jackson
properties.description: 515-acre camp located 5 miles east of Scottsboro on the Tennessee River at Jones Cove.

properties.name: Camp O'Rear
properties.description: 90-acre primitive-style scout camp featuring a small dining hall with kitchen and fireplace.

properties.name: Camp Sequoyah (Frank Spain Scout Reservation)
properties.description: 1,447-acre reservation in the Talladega National Forest near Mt. Cheaha, featuring 80-acre Lake Cross for boating, kayaking, and swimming. Dedicated June 29, 1972.

properties.name: Camp Westmoreland
properties.description: 284-acre historic camp on Shoals Creek, one of the oldest BSA camps in the US dating to 1929. Listed on the Alabama Historical Commission Register.

properties.name: Maubila Scout Reservation
properties.description: 450+ acre reservation in Clarke County featuring a lake for water sports, dining hall, archery, marksmanship, nature study, and STEM lab.

properties.name: Warner Scout Reservation
properties.description: 1,000-acre reservation with two camps: Camp Tukabatchee (350 acres, opened 2000) and Cub Scout Camp Dexter C. Hobbs. Features a 50-acre lake and COPE course.

properties.name: White Bluff Scout Reservation
properties.description: Primitive scout high adventure camp on the Black Warrior River featuring a large pavilion and boat landing.

properties.name: Camp Geronimo
properties.description: Nearly 200-acre summer camp at 5,420 ft elevation at the base of the Mogollon Rim, featuring 29 campsites, a lake, climbing tower, swimming pool, and shooting sports.

properties.name: Camp Lawton
properties.description: Scout camp in the Santa Catalina Mountains, continuously operated since 1921. Offers mountain biking, hiking trails, tent and cabin camping.

properties.name: Double V Scout Ranch
properties.description: 360-acre ranch six miles southwest of Tucson near Cat Mountain, featuring ramadas, a junior Olympic swimming pool, and Sonoran Desert terrain.

properties.name: Heard Scout Pueblo
properties.description: 500-acre Sonoran Desert property at the base of South Mountain with 120 acres of trails, hosting Cub Scout Day Camp, shooting sports, and camping.

properties.name: R-C Scout Ranch
properties.description: 78-acre former working cattle ranch southeast of Payson along AZ Route 260, purchased in 1945. Home to Cub Scout Summer Resident Camp and various training programs.

properties.name: Raymond Scout Reservation
properties.description: 160-acre camp between the Kaibab and Coconino National Forests, 30 miles from Flagstaff along the rim of Sycamore Canyon. Opened in 1964.

properties.name: Camp De Soto
properties.description: Historic scout camp in Union County, operated since 1919. Formerly De Soto Area Council, now managed by Natural State Council.

properties.name: Camp Orr
properties.description: 600-acre high adventure camp on the Buffalo National River, the only BSA-accredited camp sheltered on all sides by the National Park Service.

properties.name: Camp Pioneer
properties.description: Former council camp in the Ouachita Mountains foothills where the Mountain Fork River and Two Mile Creek converge.

properties.name: Camp Preston Hunt
properties.description: 250+ acre year-round camp originally built in 1936 with WPA labor, featuring cabins, a stocked lake, dining hall, and the historic Whitmarsh Amphitheater.

properties.name: Camp Spencer
properties.description: 100-acre primitive camping peninsula on Lake Norfork with nearly 1.5 miles of shoreline, 75% wooded.

properties.name: Gus Blass Scout Reservation
properties.description: 3,200-acre reservation home to Camp Rockefeller, featuring the Donald W. Reynolds Scout Training Center, lakes, streams, caves, and forests.

properties.name: Kia Kima Scout Reservation
properties.description: Nationally accredited summer camp and scouting tradition since 1916, split into Camp Osage, Camp Cherokee, and the Ozark Venture Base in the Ozark Mountains.

properties.name: Rogers Scout Reservation
properties.description: 2,800-acre facility built on former Booneville Sanatorium land, featuring a 250-person dining hall, training lodge, and 115-acre Keenan Lake.

properties.name: Camp Alpine (Kandersteg International Scout Centre)
properties.description: BSA high adventure program at the Kandersteg International Scout Centre in the Swiss Alps, offering hiking, climbing, and cultural exchange.

properties.name: Camp Avantura BSA
properties.description: BSA high adventure base on the Istrian Peninsula in Croatia, offering sailing, sea kayaking, and cultural exploration along the Adriatic coast.

properties.name: Camp Kenya
properties.description: BSA high adventure program in Kenya featuring wildlife safaris, community service projects, and outdoor adventures near Mount Kenya.

properties.name: Akridge Scout Reservation
properties.description: 85-acre Scout reservation on the former Kesselring family farm, located just south of Dover in Kent County.

properties.name: Camp Cherokee
properties.description: Primitive Scout camp located on Yatesville Lake near Louisa, Kentucky.

properties.name: McKee Scout Reservation
properties.description: 900+ acre Scout reservation featuring campsites, hiking trails, camp buildings, and a 15-acre lake in eastern Kentucky.

properties.name: Boxwell Scout Reservation
properties.description: Scout reservation located on Old Hickory Lake, serving the Middle Tennessee Council.

properties.name: Camp Buck Toms
properties.address: 373 Camp Buck Toms Rd, Rockwood, TN 37854
properties.description: Scout summer camp on the shores of Watts Bar Lake, operated by the Great Smoky Mountain Council.

properties.name: Camp Davy Crockett
properties.description: 1,865-acre Scout camp in the foothills of the Great Smoky Mountains with 9 miles of shoreline on Cherokee Lake.

properties.name: Camp Mack Morris
properties.address: 455 Camp Mack Morris Rd, Camden, TN 38320
properties.description: Nearly 500 acres nestled in the rural hills and valleys of Benton County on the Tennessee River.

properties.name: Camp Pellissippi
properties.address: 262 Boy Scout Camp Rd, Andersonville, TN 37705
properties.description: Rustic Scout camp on the shores of Norris Lake with cabins, Adirondack campsites, and tent sites available year-round.

properties.name: Charles E. Parrish Wilderness Reservation
properties.description: Scout reservation available for weekend camping, camporees, and other events near Rock Island.

properties.name: Grimes Canoe Base
properties.description: Canoe base providing access to over 110 miles of water on the Buffalo River for Scouts.

properties.name: Latimer High Adventure Reservation
properties.description: 1,550-acre wilderness reservation on the Cumberland Plateau offering rustic camping and high adventure programs.

properties.name: Skymont Scout Reservation
properties.description: Over 2,200 acres on the Cumberland Plateau featuring waterfalls, scenic overlooks, caves, and wooded forest.

properties.name: Camp Barstow
properties.description: Over 300 acres along the banks of Lake Murray in Saluda County.

properties.name: Camp Coker
properties.address: 2056 Camp Coker Rd, Society Hill, SC 29593
properties.description: 335-acre historic property located outside Society Hill, owned by the Camp Coker Trust and leased to the Indian Waters Council.

properties.name: Camp Conley Clarke
properties.description: Approximately 450 acres with a pond, open fields, and wooded natural areas.

properties.name: Camp Ho Non Wah
properties.address: 2609 Boy Scout Rd, Wadmalaw Island, SC 29487
properties.description: 184-acre retreat along the banks of the Bohicket River on Wadmalaw Island.

properties.name: Camp Old Indian
properties.address: 601 Callahan Mountain Rd, Travelers Rest, SC 29690
properties.description: Scout summer camp operated by the Blue Ridge Council near Travelers Rest.

properties.name: Glendale Outdoor Leadership School (GOLS)
properties.description: Outdoor leadership school near the Pacolet River offering mountain biking, rock climbing, and kayaking programs.
